title: Plugins
desktopRuntimeDesc: Desktop telemetry is additive only. Plugin data below still comes from the backend API as the authoritative source.
updateInstalled: Update {version} installed and waiting for restart.
filterPluginsDesc: Search across installed, built-in, and marketplace entries without leaving the panel.
searchPlaceholder: Search by name, tag, runtime, or source
noInstalledMatch: No installed plugins match the current filters.
noInstalledPlugins: No plugins installed yet. Browse the built-in or marketplace tabs to get started.
noBuiltinMatch: No built-in plugins match the current filters.
installableFromBuiltin: Installable from the built-in discovery registry.
noMarketplaceMatch: No marketplace plugins match the current filters.
noRemoteRegistryMatch: No remote registry plugins match the current filters.
remoteInstallNotReady: Remote marketplace installation is not wired into the current platform contract yet.

pluginCard.hintReady: This plugin is ready to be managed from the installed registry.
pluginCard.hintNoRuntime: Runtime actions unavailable: this plugin does not use an executable runtime host in the current platform phase.
pluginCard.hintDisabled: Enable this plugin before activation or health checks are available.
pluginCard.hintActivating: Plugin is activating. Runtime checks will become available once activation finishes.

detailSidebar.title: Plugin details
detailSidebar.desc: Inspect runtime, permissions, health, and source metadata for the selected installed plugin.
detailSidebar.selectPrompt: Select an installed plugin to inspect operational details.

installDialog.descSource: Choose a source to install a plugin from.
installDialog.descInstalling: Please wait while the plugin is being installed.
installDialog.nativePathHint: Native path browsing is only available in the desktop shell.

configDialog.title: Configure {name}
configDialog.desc: Edit the plugin configuration. Changes take effect after saving.

invokeDialog.title: Invoke {name}
invokeDialog.desc: Send an operation request to the plugin runtime. Provide an operation name and an optional JSON payload.
